text: As we discussed in our last meeting, the deadline has not changed. Please plan accordingly.
Per my last email, the report was due Friday. Let me know if you need me to resend it for a third time.
Friendly reminder that the timesheet submission window closed two days ago.
Oh wonderful, another surprise meeting on the calendar. Really helps with planning my week.
Great job breaking the build again. Truly inspiring stuff from the senior engineer role.
The Q3 numbers are attached. Let me know if you have any questions.
Hey team! Just wanted to say thanks for crushing it on the launch this week. Coffee is on me Friday!
This is unacceptable. The client is furious and I need answers from your team by end of day.
I need the revised deck on my desk by 3pm. No more extensions.
Happy Monday everyone! Hope you all had a restful weekend. Standup at 9:30 as usual.
Just circling back on this since I haven't heard anything since last Tuesday. Any updates?
Per our policy (which I assume you've read), PTO requests require two weeks' notice.
Please find the onboarding checklist attached. Reach out if anything is unclear.
I've told you three times now: stop pushing directly to main. Do it again and we're having a conversation with your manager.
We are going to hit this deadline. I need everyone focused, blockers surfaced by EOD, and statuses updated daily.
Thanks so much for jumping on that bug fix over the weekend, really appreciate you going above and beyond.
Not sure if my previous message made it through, but the review is still blocked on your approval.
The deployment will occur at 02:00 UTC on Saturday. Expected downtime is under five minutes.
Stop CC-ing my manager on every little thing. If you have an issue with my work, come to me directly.
Going forward, all design reviews must be scheduled through the shared calendar. No exceptions.
